classification.task_goal: Deploy a smart contract and create a front-end interface using Vue.js.
primary_constraints: The migration script must correctly reference the contract name.
The migration script must use valid JavaScript syntax.
The front-end code must be written in Vue.js.
classification.reasoning: The user initially faced issues with the migration script due to incorrect contract naming and syntax errors. They received guidance to correct these issues, which they followed, indicating a repair of constraints. However, there was a drift in the constraints as the user had to adapt to the errors encountered.
